description: Body-only bird skeleton -- the shared rig for the 'many birds, one rig' reuse case. Every bird mesh skins to these bone names; the bird animation library (idle/fly) is authored once against them. Bind pose: wings level, feet at the origin on z=0, beak facing +X.
bind_pose_units: metre, +Z up, +X forward; per-bone head/tail are world-space rest positions

states._note: States a bird variant may deliver. A variant MUST deliver at least `idle`; others are optional. fps/playback/frames are the shipped bird_v1_anim.json defaults; a variant may override frames/fps in its asset.json. Extra states beyond this list are allowed if the variant authors clips for them. State names target the engine clip vocabulary (constants.ENGINE_CLIP_VOCAB) or resolve through constants.CLIP_SYNONYMS -- no off-vocab orphan (R-5). 'fly' stays NON-load-bearing (not in ENGINE_CLIP_VOCAB; self-mapped in CLIP_SYNONYMS so it is not an orphan).
